top3_zh: 一位土耳其独立开发者的 DigitalOcean → Hetzner 迁移故事以 678 分登上 HN 首位，**单台服务器每年省 $14,388**——自托管迁移浪潮终于有了一个任何人都能复制的单位经济学核心案例。
[@bill-chambers 的匿名 token 排行榜](https://tokens.billchambers.me/leaderboard)（423 分，427 条评论）今天上线，让开发者在不知晓模型身份的情况下盲测 Opus 4.6 与 4.7 的输出——这是 AI 编程助手的首个公开盲偏好工具，最高赞评论称当前厂商基准测试是"营销剧场，被我阿姨的反应取代了"。

两篇 HN 首页文章——[@miguelconner 的"我花了几个月用老方法写代码"](https://miguelconner.substack.com/p/im-coding-by-hand)（329 分）和[一位大学讲师改用打字机遏制 AI 写作](https://sentinelcolorado.com/uncategorized/a-college-instructor-is-turning-back-to-typewriters)（129 分，136 条评论）——标志着"拒绝 AI"首次在 HN 首页的排名超过"拥抱 AI"。
top3_en: A single Turkish founder's DigitalOcean → Hetzner migration hit the HN front page at 678 points with **$14,388/year in savings on one server** — the self-hosting migration wave finally has a unit-economics centerpiece anyone can copy.

[@bill-chambers' anonymous token leaderboard](https://tokens.billchambers.me/leaderboard) (423 points, 427 comments) went live today, letting developers vote blind between Opus 4.6 and 4.7 outputs — the first public blind-preference tool for AI coding assistants, and the top comment calls current vendor benchmarks "marketing theater, replaced by my aunt's reaction."

Two HN front-page essays — [@miguelconner's "I'm spending months coding the old way"](https://miguelconner.substack.com/p/im-coding-by-hand) (329 points) and [a college instructor switching to typewriters to curb AI-written essays](https://sentinelcolorado.com/uncategorized/a-college-instructor-is-turning-back-to-typewriters) (129 points, 136 comments) — mark the first week where "refusing AI" outranked "adopting AI" on the HN home page.
intro_zh: 今早大家都在重新编译 AI 提示词以节省 30% 的 token——这个记分牌选错了。当头版头条在争论 [Claude 4.7 的 1.47 倍 tokenizer 膨胀](https://www.claudecodecamp.com/p/i-measured-claude-4-7-s-new-tokenizer-costs)时，一位名叫 [@isayeter](https://isayeter.com/posts/digitalocean-to-hetzner-migration) 的土耳其独立开发者，凭借将 248GB MySQL 数据、30 个数据库、34 个 Nginx 站点、GitLab EE、Neo4j 以及一个线上移动应用从 DigitalOcean 迁移到单台 Hetzner AX162-R，以 678 分登上 Hacker News 首位——将账单从**每月 $1,432 压缩到 $233**，每年省下 **$14,388**，且零停机。
intro_en: Everyone is recompiling AI prompts to save 30% on tokens this morning — wrong scoreboard. While the front page argues over [Claude 4.7's 1.47x tokenizer inflation](https://www.claudecodecamp.com/p/i-measured-claude-4-7-s-new-tokenizer-costs), a Turkish solo founder named [@isayeter](https://isayeter.com/posts/digitalocean-to-hetzner-migration) hit #1 on Hacker News at 678 points by moving 248 GB of MySQL, 30 databases, 34 Nginx sites, GitLab EE, Neo4j, and a live mobile app from DigitalOcean to a single Hetzner AX162-R — cutting his bill from **$1,432/mo to $233/mo**, banking **$14,388 a year**, with zero downtime.
